# PRD-011: Drizzle ORM

> Epic: [06 — Drizzle ORM](../../epics/06-drizzle-orm.md)
> Status: Done

## Overview

Adopt Drizzle ORM for type-safe database access and schema-as-code. Define all table schemas in TypeScript so the schema IS the type. Replace raw SQL queries with typed Drizzle queries. Set up `drizzle-kit` for automated migration generation. See ADR-013 for the decision rationale.

## What Changes

| Aspect            | Before (raw SQL)                         | After (Drizzle)                                          |
| ----------------- | ---------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------- |
| Schema definition | Hand-written SQL in migration files      | TypeScript schema files (single source of truth)         |
| Types             | Separate zod schemas in `@pops/db-types` | Inferred from schema (`InferSelectModel<typeof movies>`) |
| Queries           | `db.prepare(sql).all(params) as Row[]`   | `db.select().from(table).where(condition)`               |
| Migrations        | Hand-written SQL                         | Auto-generated by `drizzle-kit generate`, reviewable SQL |

## What Stays The Same

- better-sqlite3 as the SQLite driver (Drizzle wraps it)
- Synchronous database access
- Single SQLite file
- Parameterised queries (Drizzle handles automatically)

## Schema File Structure

```
apps/pops-api/src/db/
  schema/
    entities.ts
    transactions.ts
    budgets.ts
    movies.ts
    tv-shows.ts
    watchlist.ts
    watch-history.ts
    comparisons.ts
    inventory.ts
    locations.ts
    settings.ts
    ...
    index.ts            (re-export all tables)
  drizzle.config.ts     (drizzle-kit configuration)
  index.ts              (db connection, export drizzle instance)
```

## Business Rules

- All new tables defined as Drizzle schemas from day one
- Existing tables migrated incrementally (one module at a time)
- Zod schemas for input validation remain — they validate user input, not database rows
- Row type definitions come from Drizzle inference, not manual type definitions
- Auto-generated migrations are always reviewed before applying — no blind applies
- Synchronous better-sqlite3 mode preserved

## Edge Cases

| Case                                           | Behaviour                                                                                        |
| ---------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Existing raw SQL in a module                   | Migrated to Drizzle queries when that module is touched — no big-bang rewrite                    |
| Complex raw SQL query (CTEs, window functions) | Drizzle supports raw SQL escape hatch via `sql` template literal — use sparingly                 |
| `@pops/db-types` package                       | Re-exports Drizzle inferred types. Gradually deprecated as consumers import directly from schema |

## User Stories

| #   | Story                                                               | Summary                                                                              | Status | Parallelisable   |
| --- | ------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------ | ---------------- |
| 01  | [us-01-drizzle-setup](us-01-drizzle-setup.md)                       | Install drizzle-orm + drizzle-kit, create config, set up db connection wrapper       | Done   | No (first)       |
| 02  | [us-02-schema-definitions](us-02-schema-definitions.md)             | Define Drizzle schema files for all existing tables                                  | Done   | Blocked by us-01 |
| 03  | [us-03-core-module-migration](us-03-core-module-migration.md)       | Migrate core module queries (entities, ai-usage, settings) to Drizzle                | Done   | Blocked by us-02 |
| 04  | [us-04-finance-module-migration](us-04-finance-module-migration.md) | Migrate finance module queries (transactions, budgets, imports, wishlist) to Drizzle | Done   | Blocked by us-02 |
| 05  | [us-05-remaining-modules](us-05-remaining-modules.md)               | Migrate media and inventory module queries to Drizzle                                | Done   | Blocked by us-02 |
| 06  | [us-06-mise-tasks](us-06-mise-tasks.md)                             | Add mise tasks for drizzle-kit generate and migrate                                  | Done   | Yes              |

US-03, US-04, US-05 can parallelise after US-02. US-06 can parallelise with US-02.

## Verification

- All existing tests pass with Drizzle queries
- TypeScript catches column name typos at compile time
- `drizzle-kit generate` produces a valid migration from schema changes
- No `as Row[]` type casts remain in migrated modules
- `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm lint`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm build` pass
- `mise drizzle:generate` and `mise drizzle:migrate` work

## Out of Scope

- Changing the database engine (stays SQLite)
- Async queries (synchronous mode preserved)
- New domain schemas (those come from their respective themes)

## Drift Check
